community.name: Faculty of Computer Science and Engineering
community.description: Research and academic outputs in computer science, software engineering, systems, and computing technologies.
community.intro: Faculty repository space for publications, student work, projects, and supporting research materials.

collection.name: Publications
collection.description: Journal articles, conference papers, book chapters, and other scholarly publications.
collection.intro: Peer-reviewed and scholarly outputs from faculty members, researchers, and students.

collection.name: Theses and Dissertations
collection.description: Bachelor, master, and doctoral research outputs.
collection.intro: Student theses, dissertations, and final research projects.

collection.name: Research Projects
collection.description: Project reports, deliverables, technical documentation, and related outputs.
collection.intro: Materials produced through faculty research projects and collaborations.

collection.name: Datasets and Software
collection.description: Research datasets, source code, software artifacts, and reproducibility materials.
collection.intro: Data and software created to support teaching, research, and publication.

community.name: Faculty of Communication Networks and Security
community.description: Research and academic outputs in networking, cybersecurity, secure systems, and communications infrastructure.
community.intro: Faculty repository space for publications, student work, projects, and supporting research materials.

collection.description: Journal articles, conference papers, book chapters, and other scholarly publications.
collection.intro: Peer-reviewed and scholarly outputs from faculty members, researchers, and students.

collection.description: Project reports, deliverables, technical documentation, and related outputs.
collection.intro: Materials produced through faculty research projects and collaborations.

collection.name: Datasets and Software
collection.description: Research datasets, source code, software artifacts, and reproducibility materials.
collection.intro: Data and software created to support teaching, research, and publication.
